flashcards.exportTSVDesc: Generates a .tsv file + media folder. Import into Anki manually.
flashcards.exportAPKGDesc: Single .apkg file with everything included. Just double-click to import.
settings.cpuCoresEasyDesc: Choose how much of your computer's power to allocate for flashcard generation. Higher profiles are faster but may slow down other applications.
settings.cpuCoresExpertDesc: Manually configure CPU thread allocation and memory constraints for processing.
settings.cpuCoresActiveHint: Click on a core block to adjust the active core count.
settings.ramLimitDesc: Limits maximum RAM consumption during video clip encoding and extraction.
flashcards.mediaTypeVideo: Video detected — audio clips, screenshots and video clips available
flashcards.mediaTypeAudio: Audio detected — only audio clips available
shortcuts.overlay.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.overlay.hint: Press Shift+? to toggle this panel
flashcards.newGenerationDesc: Reset and start a new flashcard generation
